steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the note ‘Euramerica formed about 300 million years ago.’ This directly answers the question’s goal of specifying when Euramerica formed.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The correct choice must include both ‘Euramerica’ and the specific time ‘300 million years ago.’ A pairs these directly.

  • B discusses the supercontinent cycle without specific timing
  • C provides a general definition
  • D mentions both supercontinents generically
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
